_comment: GOLD-SET REGISTRY — single source of truth for which key is LIVE per sol (sol -> active_version + key_type). Nothing else guesses liveness. Authored by Code per Brain card-64 Q2 (whole-set registry). key_type enum = {full_verdict, oos_detection}. Construction packages are oos_detection (engine honest-fails OUT_OF_SCOPE, no verdict); discrete supply/repair/services are full_verdict.

supersedes.reason: partial source; restored to full_verdict CAUTION against certified-complete source per #4 in-scope ruling 2026-06-26 (cards 66/68); supersedes the brief card-64 construction reclassification. Caution basis source-corrected per card 67 (Davis-Bacon reason refuted by source).
reclassified full_verdict->oos_detection per construction honest-fail ruling 2026-06-26; old key retired in place, byte-identical, content untouched
